workflows.idea: When new lead fills Typeform, then add to Mailchimp list, create Salesforce contact, and notify sales team
When customer abandons cart, then send reminder email with 10% discount code
When payment received on Stripe, then generate PDF receipt and email to customer
When Shopify order is placed, then create QuickBooks invoice and update inventory
When customer review posted on Google My Business, then sentiment analysis and respond with template
When high-value lead created, then assign to sales and require qualification call
When demo call ends, then send personalized follow-up email with recording link and next steps
When contract signed in DocuSign, then save to legal folder and notify finance team
When pricing page is visited by known lead, then send personalized pricing breakdown email
When customer views product 3+ times, then send personalized discount offer
When new email arrives with 'invoice' in subject, then extract amount and due date, create calendar reminder, and save to expenses folder
When expense exceeds $1000, then pause and require manager approval before processing
When customer requests refund over $500, then supervisor approval required
When invoice amount exceeds threshold, then require dual approval
When purchase order over $25000, then require CFO approval and signature
When budget variance exceeds 15%, then alert finance and require explanation
When Twitter mention contains 'support', then create Zendesk ticket and reply with ticket number
When Zendesk ticket marked solved, then request CSAT survey via email
When customer escalates complaint, then supervisor intervention and approval
When customer birthday approaches, then send personalized offer and add to celebration campaign
When new employee added to HR system, then create accounts in Slack, Google Workspace, and Notion
When employee promotion recommended, then HR review and director approval
When HR termination initiated, then legal review and director approval required
When candidate is rejected, then send personalized feedback email and add to talent pipeline
When benefits enrollment period opens, then send personalized options summary and deadline reminders
When new podcast episode published, then transcribe, create blog post, and share on social media
When Instagram post receives 100 likes, then save to Airtable and analyze engagement
When LinkedIn post gets 50 comments, then export data and create engagement report
When RSS feed updates with new article, then summarize with AI and post to company blog
When content scheduled for publication, then editor review and approval required
When marketing spend exceeds $10000, then freeze and require VP approval
When newsletter compiled, then personalize content and optimize send time
When meeting ends, then generate transcript, extract action items, and email participants
When calendar event starts, then mute phone and set Slack status to 'in meeting'
When calendar shows vacation, then set email auto-reply and assign tasks to backup
When Airtable record updated, then sync changes to Google Sheets and Notion
When competitor website changes pricing page, then capture screenshot and alert sales team
When new file added to Dropbox folder, then compress and upload to AWS S3
When Jira ticket assigned to me, then add to Todoist and block time on calendar
When document uploaded to SharePoint, then OCR extract text and index in Elasticsearch
When GitHub issue is labeled 'urgent', then post to Slack #urgent channel and notify team lead
When server CPU exceeds 90%, then restart service and notify DevOps team
When GitLab merge request created, then run tests and post results as comment
When Slack message contains 'deploy', then trigger CI/CD pipeline and post status
When pull request is merged, then update changelog, trigger deployment, and notify QA
When service health check fails, then restart container and verify recovery
When API call fails with timeout, then retry with exponential backoff and alert if persistent
When database connection drops, then reconnect and replay queued transactions
When payment processing fails, then retry with backup gateway and notify
When backup job fails, then retry with alternate storage and escalate on third failure
When contract value over $50000, then route to legal review and await sign-off
When new vendor onboarded, then compliance check and finance approval required
When partnership agreement drafted, then legal and executive approval required
When access to sensitive data requested, then security review and manager approval
When Google Form is submitted, then create Trello card and send confirmation email
When stock price drops 5%, then buy shares and notify portfolio manager
When flight delayed, then rebook hotel and notify travel coordinator
When content flagged as sensitive, then hold for moderator review and approval
When database migration submitted, then require DBA approval and schedule window
When production deployment requested, then require QA sign-off and approval
When user reports critical bug, then triage and require product manager approval
When new feature released, then require product owner sign-off before announcement
When security patch critical, then CISO approval required before deployment
When code changes affect API, then require architect review and approval
When user requests data export, then verify identity and require manager approval
When construction change order submitted, then owner approval required
When webhook delivery fails, then retry with queue and alert after 5 attempts
When email bounces, then validate address and retry with alternate provider
When file upload fails, then resume from checkpoint and verify integrity
When sensor goes offline, then poll alternate endpoint and dispatch technician
When CDN cache purge fails, then retry and bypass cache if persistent
When SMS delivery fails, then retry with different provider and log
When data sync interrupted, then resume delta sync and verify consistency
When build fails, then retry with clean environment and notify if persistent
When certificate renewal fails, then retry with alternate CA and alert
When search index update fails, then retry and rebuild if corrupted
When notification delivery fails, then queue and retry with exponential delay
When report generation fails, then retry with reduced scope and escalate
When data export fails, then retry with pagination and verify completeness
When ML model inference fails, then fallback to previous version and alert
When cache warming fails, then retry and disable cache if persistent
When workflow step fails, then rollback and retry from last checkpoint
When external API rate limited, then pause and retry after reset
When image processing fails, then retry with lower resolution and log
When email parsing fails, then quarantine and manual review

When Monitor website uptime every minute and alert if unavailable for 2 minutes, ensuring system reliability
When Track SSL certificate expiration and alert 30 days before expiry, ensuring system reliability
When Monitor database connection pool and alert if utilization exceeds 80%, ensuring system reliability
When Check disk space every hour and alert if below 10% remaining, ensuring system reliability
When Monitor API error rates and alert if 5xx errors exceed 1%, ensuring system reliability
When Track failed login attempts and alert security team if threshold breached, ensuring system reliability
When Monitor server temperature and shutdown if critical threshold reached, ensuring system reliability
When Check backup completion daily and alert if any job failed, ensuring system reliability
When Monitor log files for ERROR patterns and create tickets automatically, ensuring system reliability
When Track domain expiration and alert 60 days before renewal needed, ensuring system reliability
When Monitor certificate revocation status and alert if compromised, ensuring system reliability
When Check payment gateway health and alert if processing delays detected, ensuring system reliability
When Monitor email deliverability rates and alert if below 95%, ensuring system reliability
When Track CDN cache hit rates and optimize if below threshold, ensuring system reliability
When Monitor search index lag and alert if behind by more than 5 minutes, ensuring system reliability
When Check data replication lag and alert if exceeds acceptable threshold, ensuring system reliability
When Monitor queue depths and scale workers if backlog grows, ensuring system reliability
When Track third-party API response times and alert if degraded, ensuring system reliability
When Monitor memory leaks in applications and alert developers, ensuring system reliability
When Check for unauthorized access attempts and lock accounts, ensuring system reliability
When Monitor cost anomalies in cloud spending and alert finance, ensuring system reliability
When Track SLA compliance and alert if commitments at risk, ensuring system reliability
When Monitor data quality metrics and alert if anomalies detected, ensuring system reliability
When Check for stale dependencies and alert engineering teams, ensuring system reliability

When member passes away, then update records, send condolences, and handle estate matters
When fermentation reaches target, then alert cellar team and schedule next step
When batch is ready for bottling, then schedule line, prepare materials, and assign crew
When tasting room reservation is made, then confirm party size and note preferences
When wine club shipment is due, then select wines, process payments, and schedule fulfillment
When license renewal is approaching, then gather documents and submit application
When ingredient shipment arrives, then verify quality, log lot numbers, and store properly
When harvest date is determined, then schedule picking, coordinate crews, and prep equipment
When vehicle arrives in inventory, then photograph, price, and list on website
When test drive is requested, then verify license, assign salesperson, and prepare vehicle
When financing application is submitted, then run credit, compare lenders, and present options
When trade-in is appraised, then generate offer, document condition, and prepare paperwork
When service appointment is booked, then create repair order and order parts if needed
When recall is announced, then identify affected vehicles and notify owners
When sales goal is achieved, then calculate commissions and notify finance
When custom cake order is placed, then confirm details, calculate pricing, and schedule production
When daily bake schedule is finalized, then prep ingredients, assign bakers, and set timers
When product sells out, then update signage, notify staff, and consider increasing tomorrow batch
When wholesale order is received, then verify quantities, schedule production, and arrange delivery
When temperature alarm triggers, then alert manager, check product safety, and document incident
When special diet item is requested, then verify recipe, check for cross-contamination, and label clearly
When day-old items accumulate, then mark down, donate, or compost per policy
When flower delivery is scheduled, then prepare arrangement, assign driver, and notify recipient
When wholesale shipment arrives, then inspect quality, process flowers, and restock coolers
When event floral order is confirmed, then plan arrangements, order supplies, and schedule setup
When subscription renewal is due, then charge card, select arrangement, and schedule delivery
When flower inventory is aging, then mark down for quick sale or use in daily arrangements
When delivery fails, then contact recipient, reschedule, and update customer
When sympathy order is placed, then prioritize preparation and send condolence card
When social media account is compromised, then lock account, alert security, and notify users
When customer survey response is submitted, then categorize feedback and route to relevant team
When marketing automation email bounces, then clean list and update contact status
When API documentation is updated, then rebuild site, notify developers, and update changelog
When backup verification fails, then alert operations and initiate manual verification
When SaaS subscription invoice is received, then match to budget, route for approval, and process
When employee benefits question is asked, then route to HR and provide self-service links
When product roadmap is updated, then notify stakeholders and update public status page
When affiliate commission is earned, then calculate payout and schedule payment
When customer success score drops, then alert CSM and schedule health check call
When database backup completes, then verify integrity, log success, and clean old backups
When team retrospective is scheduled, then send prep questions and collect feedback ahead
When integration connection fails, then attempt reconnect, alert user, and log incident
When employee submits expense mileage, then calculate reimbursement and add to report
When marketing landing page goes live, then test all CTAs, verify tracking, and alert team
When customer account is merged, then combine data, preserve history, and notify account owner
When feature request is upvoted significantly, then escalate to product and notify voters
